input.description: Input text to embed, as a string or array of strings/tokens

model.description: ID of the model to use (e.g., text-embedding-ada-002, text-embedding-3-small, text-embedding-3-large)

encoding_format.description: The format to return the embeddings in

dimensions.description: The number of dimensions the resulting output embeddings should have. Supported in text-embedding-3 and later models.

user.description: A unique identifier representing your end-user
